plugins.name: dingduff
plugins.description: DingDuff legal research & workflow skills for Claude: case-law research (standard and deep), deep statutory research, citation verification (/dingduff:dingduff-citation-check) of Markdown, Word, or Google Docs memos against stored sources plus attorney-supplied documents, and practitioner-style citation formatting. The research and verification skills use the DingDuff MCP connector.
